category.scope_note: Electric, cordless, and battery-powered hand-held or transportable power tools exported from China to Laos.

target_market_label.zh: 老挝（DOSM / 能源矿产部 / EDL）
target_market_label.zht: 寮國（DOSM / 能源礦產部 / EDL）

title.en: China-to-Laos Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入老挝：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入寮國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Informational comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Laos DOSM conformity certification, MEM and EDL electrical context, EMC and wireless review, workplace noise, and battery or substance-control expectations.
description.zh: 中国电动工具合规与老挝 DOSM 合格评定、能源矿产部和 EDL 电力环境、EMC 与无线审查、职业噪声以及电池或物质管控预期的信息性对照。
description.zht: 中國電動工具合規與寮國 DOSM 合格評定、能源礦產部和 EDL 電力環境、EMC 與無線審查、職業噪聲以及電池或物質管控預期的資訊性對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, DOSM approval, MEM or EDL technical acceptance, importer clearance instruction, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Lao regulated-goods lists, IEC adoption, power-utility requirements, wireless approvals, and Thailand or Vietnam transit conditions with qualified local professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、DOSM 批准、能源矿产部或 EDL 技术接受、进口清关指示或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格当地专业人士核验老挝现行受管制商品清单、IEC 采标、电力公司要求、无线批准以及经泰国或越南转运条件。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、DOSM 批准、能源礦產部或 EDL 技術接受、進口清關指示或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格當地專業人士核驗寮國現行受管制商品清單、IEC 採標、電力公司要求、無線批准以及經泰國或越南轉運條件。

answer_first.en: For China-made power tools entering Laos, the practical baseline is DOSM conformity certification if the product is on the regulated-goods list, IEC 60745 or IEC 62841 style safety evidence where adopted or accepted, 230 V 50 Hz suitability for the Lao grid, wireless approval for connected tools, and honest documentation that Laos does not have an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime for ordinary power tools.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动工具进入老挝的实务基线，是在产品列入受管制商品时办理 DOSM 合格认证，按采纳或接受的 IEC 60745 或 IEC 62841 路径准备安全证据，确认适配老挝 230 V 50 Hz 电网，对联网工具办理无线批准，并如实说明老挝对普通电动工具没有欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動工具進入寮國的實務基線，是在產品列入受管制商品時辦理 DOSM 合格認證，按採納或接受的 IEC 60745 或 IEC 62841 路徑準備安全證據，確認適配寮國 230 V 50 Hz 電網，對聯網工具辦理無線批准，並如實說明寮國對普通電動工具沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Human regulatory review required before marking verified or human_reviewed.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must retain official-source URLs, publisher names, access dates, and verified flags; update fragments without copying EU regulatory obligations into the Laos target column.
